text:
= The provider has no chain or franchise relationships. 

COMMENT: If there is a relationship ID (variable called RELATIONSHIP_ID), then the type of relationship is captured 
in this field. Note that the type of relationship in this field may not correspond with the dispenser class 
code for the pharmacy (DISPENSER_CLASS). 

Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/.
